detailed_description: User reports unable to access Outlook. Getting error message 'Cannot connect to server'. Issue started this morning after Windows update.
resolution_notes: Issue was caused by Outlook profile corruption after Windows update. Recreated Outlook profile and user can now access email successfully.
resolution_steps:
1. Backed up existing Outlook data file (.pst)
2. Opened Control Panel > Mail
3. Clicked 'Show Profiles'
4. Created new profile with user's email address
5. Set new profile as default
6. Restarted Outlook
7. Verified email access and folder synchronization

detailed_description: Remote user cannot connect to company VPN. Error message: 'Connection timeout'. User needs to access internal systems urgently.
resolution_notes: VPN client was outdated. Updated to latest version and connection successful.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified user credentials
2. Checked VPN server status (operational)
3. Identified outdated VPN client version
4. Sent download link for latest VPN client
5. Guided user through installation
6. Tested VPN connection
7. Confirmed access to internal resources

detailed_description: Office printer not responding. Print jobs stuck in queue. Multiple users affected.
resolution_notes: Printer was offline due to network cable disconnection. Reconnected cable and cleared print queue.
resolution_steps:
1. Checked printer power and status lights
2. Verified network connectivity
3. Found loose network cable
4. Reconnected network cable securely
5. Restarted printer
6. Cleared stuck print jobs from queue
7. Sent test print from multiple computers
8. Confirmed printer operational

detailed_description: CRM application extremely slow. Takes 30+ seconds to load records. Affecting sales team productivity.
resolution_notes: Database query optimization needed. Worked with DBA to add indexes and optimize slow queries. Performance improved significantly.
resolution_steps:
1. Identified slow-running queries using database monitoring
2. Analyzed query execution plans
3. Added missing indexes on frequently queried columns
4. Optimized JOIN operations
5. Updated database statistics
6. Cleared application cache
7. Tested application performance
8. Confirmed 80% improvement in load times

detailed_description: User forgot password and account is locked after multiple failed login attempts.
resolution_notes: Verified user identity and reset password. Unlocked account and user able to login successfully.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified user identity using security questions
2. Unlocked user account in Active Directory
3. Reset password to temporary password
4. Sent secure password reset link via email
5. Guided user through password change process
6. Verified successful login
7. Reminded user of password policy requirements

detailed_description: User needs Adobe Acrobat Pro installed but installation keeps failing with error code 1603.
resolution_notes: Previous installation remnants were causing conflict. Cleaned up registry and temp files, then successfully installed software.
resolution_steps:
1. Reviewed installation logs
2. Identified conflicting previous installation
3. Used Adobe Cleaner Tool to remove remnants
4. Cleared Windows temp folder
5. Cleaned relevant registry entries
6. Restarted computer
7. Ran installation as administrator
8. Verified software launches correctly
9. Activated license

detailed_description: User cannot access shared department folder. Getting 'Access Denied' error. User recently transferred to new department.
resolution_notes: User's Active Directory group memberships not updated after department transfer. Added user to appropriate security groups.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified user's current department
2. Checked Active Directory group memberships
3. Identified missing group memberships
4. Added user to required security groups
5. Removed old department group memberships
6. Forced group policy update on user's computer
7. User logged off and back on
8. Verified access to shared folder
9. Confirmed appropriate permissions level

detailed_description: User's laptop won't power on. No lights, no response when pressing power button. User has important presentation today.
resolution_notes: Battery completely drained and power adapter was faulty. Provided replacement power adapter and laptop powered on successfully.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified power adapter LED status
2. Tested power adapter with multimeter (no output)
3. Provided replacement power adapter
4. Connected to power and waited 10 minutes
5. Laptop powered on successfully
6. Verified battery charging
7. Ran hardware diagnostics (all passed)
8. Backed up critical files as precaution
9. Disposed of faulty power adapter

detailed_description: User's work email stopped syncing on iPhone. Can access email on computer but not on mobile device.
resolution_notes: Exchange ActiveSync policy change required re-authentication. Removed and re-added email account on phone.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified email working on desktop
2. Checked Exchange ActiveSync status
3. Identified recent policy change
4. Guided user to remove email account from iPhone
5. Cleared cached data
6. Re-added email account with updated settings
7. Verified email synchronization
8. Tested sending and receiving emails
9. Confirmed calendar and contacts syncing

detailed_description: Application showing 'Cannot connect to database' error. Multiple users affected. Business critical application.
resolution_notes: Database server ran out of disk space. Cleared old log files and expanded disk space. Service restored.
resolution_steps:
1. Checked database server status
2. Identified disk space at 100%
3. Located large transaction log files
4. Backed up transaction logs
5. Truncated old log files
6. Expanded disk volume by 50GB
7. Restarted database service
8. Verified application connectivity
9. Implemented monitoring alert for disk space
10. Scheduled regular log cleanup job

detailed_description: User's laptop WiFi connection drops every 10-15 minutes. Affecting ability to attend virtual meetings.
resolution_notes: Outdated WiFi driver causing instability. Updated driver and adjusted power management settings.
resolution_steps:
1. Checked WiFi signal strength
2. Verified access point functionality
3. Identified outdated WiFi driver
4. Downloaded latest driver from manufacturer
5. Uninstalled old driver
6. Installed new driver
7. Disabled WiFi adapter power saving
8. Adjusted advanced adapter settings
9. Tested connection stability for 1 hour
10. No disconnections observed

detailed_description: User cannot open PDF attachments in email. Getting error 'File format not supported'.
resolution_notes: Adobe Reader was corrupted. Repaired installation and set as default PDF viewer.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified PDF files open on other computers
2. Attempted to open PDF with different applications
3. Ran Adobe Reader repair utility
4. Repair failed, uninstalled Adobe Reader
5. Cleared Adobe cache and temp files
6. Downloaded latest Adobe Acrobat Reader
7. Installed with default settings
8. Set as default PDF application
9. Tested opening various PDF files
10. All PDFs opening correctly

detailed_description: User received email claiming to be from IT asking for password. Email looks suspicious.
resolution_notes: Confirmed phishing attempt. Blocked sender, reported to security team, and provided user education.
resolution_steps:
1. Reviewed email headers and content
2. Confirmed phishing attempt
3. Instructed user not to click links or respond
4. Added sender to email blacklist
5. Reported to security team
6. Checked if other users received similar emails
7. Sent company-wide security alert
8. Provided phishing awareness training to user
9. Documented incident for security metrics

detailed_description: External monitor not displaying correctly. Image is distorted and colors are wrong.
resolution_notes: Monitor cable was loose and partially damaged. Replaced cable and display working perfectly.
resolution_steps:
1. Checked monitor power and connections
2. Tested monitor with different computer (same issue)
3. Inspected video cable for damage
4. Found bent pins in cable connector
5. Replaced video cable
6. Adjusted monitor display settings
7. Calibrated color settings
8. Tested with various applications
9. Display quality confirmed normal

detailed_description: Department file share showing as offline. Multiple users cannot access shared documents.
resolution_notes: File server service stopped unexpectedly. Restarted service and verified all shares accessible.
resolution_steps:
1. Pinged file server (responding)
2. Checked file server services
3. Found Server service stopped
4. Reviewed event logs for cause
5. Identified memory issue causing service crash
6. Restarted Server service
7. Verified all shares accessible
8. Tested file operations (read/write)
9. Increased server memory allocation
10. Set up monitoring for service status

detailed_description: User's wireless keyboard stopped responding. Mouse works fine but keyboard has no response.
resolution_notes: Keyboard batteries were dead. Replaced batteries and keyboard working normally.
resolution_steps:
1. Checked keyboard power indicator
2. Verified USB receiver connected
3. Tested keyboard on different computer (not working)
4. Replaced batteries
5. Re-paired keyboard with receiver
6. Tested all keys functioning
7. Provided spare batteries to user
8. Recommended keeping spare batteries in desk

detailed_description: User getting 'License expired' message when trying to open design software. Blocking urgent project work.
resolution_notes: License server had incorrect date. Corrected system time and renewed license allocation.
resolution_steps:
1. Checked license server status
2. Verified available licenses
3. Found license server system time incorrect
4. Corrected system time on license server
5. Restarted license service
6. Released and reassigned license to user
7. User able to launch application
8. Verified license expiration date
9. Set up NTP for automatic time sync

detailed_description: User experiencing very slow internet speeds. Downloads taking much longer than normal.
resolution_notes: Multiple large downloads running in background consuming bandwidth. Paused unnecessary downloads and speed returned to normal.
resolution_steps:
1. Ran speed test (confirmed slow speeds)
2. Checked network utilization
3. Identified multiple active downloads
4. Found Windows Update downloading large files
5. Paused Windows Update temporarily
6. Closed bandwidth-intensive applications
7. Cleared browser cache
8. Ran speed test again (normal speeds)
9. Scheduled Windows Update for after hours

detailed_description: User unable to join Microsoft Teams meeting. Getting error 'Unable to connect'. Important client meeting.
resolution_notes: Teams cache was corrupted. Cleared cache and user able to join meetings successfully.
resolution_steps:
1. Verified internet connectivity
2. Checked Teams service status (operational)
3. Closed Teams application
4. Cleared Teams cache folder
5. Deleted credentials from Credential Manager
6. Restarted Teams
7. User signed in again
8. Successfully joined test meeting
9. Verified audio and video working
10. User joined client meeting successfully

detailed_description: Automated backup job failed last night. Need to ensure data is backed up before end of day.
resolution_notes: Backup destination was full. Cleared old backups and successfully ran manual backup.
resolution_steps:
1. Reviewed backup logs
2. Identified 'Disk full' error
3. Checked backup destination storage
4. Found 98% disk usage
5. Archived old backups to tape
6. Deleted backups older than retention policy
7. Freed 200GB space
8. Ran manual backup job
9. Verified backup completed successfully
10. Set up storage monitoring alerts
